title: OPAC Better GUI
description: Addon for Open Parties And Claims. Simplifying party members management.
body:
Addon for Open Parties And Claims. It adds a new menu to the user interface for convenient management of your group.

**This mod runs on the client side! It does not need to be installed on the server.**
You can open a new menu through the main menu of the mod "Open parties and claims" or using the command /opacgui menu

![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb3c25a8056374f5e77fb98b2fbe03b9c9c9dbff_0.webp)

**Added GUI features:**
- List of online players on the server
- List of members in your party
- List of your allies (only party names)
- Can click on a name from the list to insert the nickname of this player in the nickname input field
- Buttons for quickly adding and removing a player to/from the party
- Buttons for quickly adding a player as an ally
- Quickly create a party with a name immediately
- Rename parties and claims

**Planned for future updates:**
- Сhat for party
- Convenient color change
- List of players from allied groups, not just their Party names
- Series of visual improvements
- Series of technical improvements and optimizations
